steps.title: Identify the relationship between sentences
steps.content: The first sentence introduces edge modeling as “one process”—keeping it general and broad. The second sentence shifts to a specific explanation of what that process involves. The transition must signal movement from general to specific.

steps.title: Apply the transition to the relationship
steps.content:
“Specifically” marks exactly this shift from general introduction to specific explanation.

The other choices signal different logical relationships—adding new facts, drawing conclusions, or making comparisons—none of which fit a general-to-specific elaboration.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
